summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BidBlitz Partner Portal. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All 7 navigation tabs work correctly. Frontend UI displays all required elements properly.

backend_api_tests.partner_login_success: PASS - Returns token and partner data with business_type_info
backend_api_tests.dashboard_returns_stats: PASS - Returns pending_payout, total_redeemed, vouchers stats
backend_api_tests.dashboard_recent_redemptions: PASS - Returns redemptions with proper date format
backend_api_tests.statistics_chart_data: PASS - Returns chart_data and top_vouchers arrays
backend_api_tests.stripe_payout_history: PASS - Returns payouts list, pending_balance, total_paid
backend_api_tests.document_types: PASS - Returns 6 document types with required flags
backend_api_tests.document_types_required: PASS - Has business_registration and id_document as required
backend_api_tests.my_documents: PASS - Returns documents list and missing_required
backend_api_tests.partner_profile_info: PASS - Returns partner info with business_type_info

frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - Shows login form with email/password fields
frontend_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login with pizza@test.de / Test123! works correctly
frontend_tests.dashboard_view: PASS - Shows 4 stats cards (Ausstehend €50.00, Eingelöst 1, Verkauft 0, Provision 10%)
frontend_tests.dashboard_redemptions: PASS - Shows recent redemptions with TEST-VHQUF7, date 17.2.2026, +€45.00
frontend_tests.statistics_view: PASS - Shows overview stats, financial overview, pie chart for voucher status
frontend_tests.payouts_view: PASS - Shows €50.00 verfügbar, Stripe Connect section, 'Mit Stripe verbinden' button
frontend_tests.verification_view: PASS - Shows 6 document types, '0 von 2 erforderlichen Dokumenten genehmigt'
frontend_tests.profile_view: PASS - Shows logo upload with pizza emoji, IBAN/Steuernummer form, account info
frontend_tests.navigation_tabs: PASS - All 7 tabs clickable (Dashboard, Scanner, Gutscheine, Statistiken, Auszahlungen, Verifizierung, Profil)

critical_code_review_comments: PartnerPortal.js - Well-structured component with proper state management for all 7 views
partner_portal.py - Complete API with login, dashboard, statistics, voucher management
partner_stripe.py - Stripe Connect integration with account creation, status check, payout request
partner_verification.py - Document upload with 6 types, verification status tracking
Dashboard shows proper date formatting (17.2.2026) and payout calculation (+€45.00 from €50 value)
All APIs properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test partner (Pizza Roma Berlin)

mocked_apis_list: Stripe Connect - Uses test mode, 'Mit Stripe verbinden' button would redirect to Stripe test onboarding

context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Portal fully functional. All 7 navigation tabs work: Dashboard (stats + redemptions), Scanner (QR code), Gutscheine (voucher list), Statistiken (charts + financials), Auszahlungen (Stripe Connect), Verifizierung (document upload), Profil (logo + bank data). Test partner: pizza@test.de / Test123! has €50.00 pending balance and 1 redemption. Stripe Connect is in test mode - not connected yet.
